string 2: There has to be a way to get to the other side...
Look! That must be the Digimon!
They're getting away! Let's go catch them!

Inori... This might be a bit scary, but I'd appreciate it if you 
stayed close to me.
Yes, of course. I promised to never leave your side.

So, hostile Digimon in the Shinjuku Underground are causing 
this? This one doesn't have what we want. Keep looking.

Once again... nothing. Maybe this is all just a big joke to them. 
Time to capture another Digimon.

This one doesn't have what we're looking for, either. Where is 
it? It's not like we can negotiate with hostile Digimon.
Hey! Could that be them...?!
We have to hurry...! Before they can run off!

Hey, you! You've got some nerve enterin' a race without my
permission!
Get over here! Now!

I'm Number 160 of the 160 Vademon Brothers. I'm holdin' a
Peckmon Race here.

Oh, so it's yer first time, eh? Ya wanna hear more about
Peckmon Races?
[Listen to the description.]
{end}Not now.

The entry fee is only 5000 YEN! Of course you'll
participate, right?!
Oh, you participatin' again...? That'll be 5000 YEN.

I heard ya were a star at my brother's place! The entry
fee is 5000 YEN! Good luck!
[Participate.]
{end}No, thanks.
Hey, this place is for serious racers only! Get lost!

Now hurry up and access the device to enter the race! The
crowd is all warmed up!
Hurry up and access the device! The crowd is waitin'!
Hey, you there! Use that device to sign up for the race!
Whoa! Don't touch it with such filthy hands!
Aw, too bad. Come back and try again sometime!

Hey! That ain't enough YEN! Come back when ya have
more money!

Here's a description of Peckmon Races. Glance through it
before the race starts.
Squawk, squawk!

I'm Number 108 of the 160 Vademon Brothers. I'm holdin' a
Peckmon Race here.

I'm Number 77 of the 160 Vademon Brothers. I'm holdin' a
Peckmon Race here.

I'm Number 2 of the 160 Vademon Brothers. I'm holdin' a
Peckmon Race here.
